description_long: This is a twin-engine propeller airplane with a high-wing configuration and a conventional tail. The fuselage is painted in a striking tricolor scheme of red, white, and blue, with a large circular blue insignia on the tail fin. The wings are straight and extend horizontally from the top of the fuselage, each featuring a red tip and a white central section. The engines are mounted on the wings, each with a visible black propeller. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, with a dark, enclosed canopy and multiple windows. The landing gear appears to be a tricycle configuration, with the main gear under the wings and a nose wheel beneath the cockpit.
description: A twin-propeller, high-wing airplane with a red, white, and blue color scheme and a conventional tail, featuring a prominent blue insignia on the tail fin.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, high-mounted wings, and the blue insignia on the tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tail fin, horizontal stabilizers, and the symmetrical wing design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the engines, propellers, and the tricolor paint scheme along the fuselage and wings.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the cockpit, nose, propellers, and the straight, high-mounted wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turboprop engines mounted on the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows.
